description: Adversaries may send spearphishing emails with a malicious attachment to elicit sensitive information or gain access to victim systems. In the banking-trojan case the attachment is a weaponized PDF impersonating a tax document.
Adversaries may attempt to exploit a weakness in an Internet-facing host or system. Here the Lambda function URL is targeted via malformed event payloads (CVE-2026-10234).
Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of existing accounts. Relevant given credential dumps surfacing in historical breaches involving the rivercity.fin domain.
